channel.title: Spam-Filtering on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Spam-Filtering on Pi Stack

item.title: SpamAssassin vs Rspamd vs Amavis: Best Self-Hosted Spam Filtering 2026
item.description: If you run a self-hosted email server, spam filtering is not optional — it’s the difference between a usable inbox and an unusable one. Every day, over 300 billion emails are sent worldwide, and roughly half of them are spam. Without a proper filtering layer, your Postfix or Dovecot setup will be overwhelmed within hours.
